jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
jobs.description: Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications using React and Node.js. You will own features end-to-end and collaborate closely with product and design.

jobs.title: Cloud Solutions Architect
jobs.description: Design resilient, cost-optimised multi-cloud architectures on AWS and GCP. Lead migrations from on-prem to cloud and establish infrastructure best practices.

jobs.title: HR Business Partner
jobs.description: Partner with senior leadership to build HR strategies that drive culture, performance, and engagement across the organisation.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
jobs.description: Own the end-to-end recruitment process for mid to senior-level roles. Partner with hiring managers to craft job profiles and deliver a world-class candidate experience.

jobs.title: Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Conduct equity research, build financial models, and produce investment reports on publicly traded companies across the technology and healthcare sectors.

jobs.title: Senior Accountant
jobs.description: Manage month-end close, prepare financial statements, and ensure compliance with GAAP. Partner with FP&A on budgeting and variance analysis.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Lead paid acquisition, SEO, and content strategy across all digital channels. Own the performance marketing budget and report on ROAS.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Strategist
jobs.description: Develop a content strategy that builds brand authority and drives organic growth. Write long-form articles, case studies, and thought leadership pieces.

jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.description: Close mid-market and enterprise SaaS deals. Own a $1.5M annual quota. Run discovery calls, product demos, and multi-stakeholder negotiations.

jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
jobs.description: Generate pipeline through outbound prospecting via cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn. Qualify inbound leads and book discovery calls for AEs.

jobs.title: Operations Manager
jobs.description: Oversee daily operations, improve process efficiency using Lean methodologies, and manage cross-functional teams across procurement, logistics, and manufacturing.

jobs.title: Process Improvement Analyst
jobs.description: Identify operational bottlenecks, conduct root-cause analysis, and implement Six Sigma improvement projects that reduce cost and increase throughput.

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: Own a portfolio of enterprise accounts. Drive product adoption, reduce churn, and identify upsell opportunities. Act as the voice of the customer internally.

jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer
jobs.description: Provide Tier 2 technical support to enterprise clients. Diagnose platform issues, write runbooks, and collaborate with engineering on bug resolution.

jobs.title: Mechanical Engineer
jobs.description: Design and test mechanical components for industrial equipment. Use SolidWorks for 3D modeling and CAD drawings, and collaborate with manufacturing on DFM.

jobs.title: Civil Engineer
jobs.description: Lead structural analysis and design for commercial and residential construction projects. Prepare technical drawings and ensure compliance with local building codes.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Define and drive the product roadmap. Work with engineering, design, and stakeholders to ship features that delight users and move key business metrics.

jobs.title: Associate Product Manager
jobs.description: Join our APM program to learn product management from experienced PMs. Own your first feature area within 3 months and ship meaningful improvements.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Craft beautiful, intuitive experiences for our flagship product. Conduct user research, run usability tests, and ship polished Figma designs to engineering.

jobs.title: Brand Designer
jobs.description: Own the visual identity system for our clients. Design across web, print, and social. Develop brand guidelines and ensure consistent expression across all touchpoints.

jobs.title: Corporate Counsel
jobs.description: Advise on M&A transactions, draft and negotiate commercial contracts, and ensure regulatory compliance across jurisdictions.

jobs.title: Legal Compliance Analyst
jobs.description: Monitor regulatory changes, maintain compliance frameworks, and conduct internal audits to ensure the organization meets all legal obligations.

jobs.title: Executive Assistant
jobs.description: Provide high-level administrative support to our C-suite. Manage complex calendars, travel itineraries, board communications, and confidential correspondence.

jobs.title: Office Administrator
jobs.description: Keep the office running smoothly. Manage vendor relationships, facilities, supplies, and coordinate events and meetings for the team.

jobs.title: Supply Chain Analyst
jobs.description: Optimize demand planning, inventory levels, and supplier performance. Build dashboards in Power BI and lead S&OP meetings with cross-functional stakeholders.

jobs.title: Logistics Coordinator
jobs.description: Coordinate domestic and international freight movements, manage carrier relationships, and resolve shipment exceptions in real time.

jobs.title: Curriculum Developer
jobs.description: Design and develop engaging instructional content for enterprise L&D programs using ADDIE and SAM methodologies.

jobs.title: Corporate Trainer
jobs.description: Facilitate leadership, soft skills, and technical training workshops for enterprise clients. Measure training effectiveness through assessments and ROI reporting.

jobs.title: Clinical Data Analyst
jobs.description: Analyse clinical datasets to uncover insights that improve patient outcomes. Build reports using SQL and Tableau for clinicians and hospital leadership.

jobs.title: Healthcare IT Specialist
jobs.description: Implement and maintain Epic EMR systems at hospital client sites. Provide end-user training and resolve technical issues with clinical workflows.

jobs.title: R&D Engineer
jobs.description: Develop and prototype next-generation hardware solutions at the intersection of robotics and AI. Work closely with research scientists to transition concepts to products.

jobs.title: Research Scientist (NLP)
jobs.description: Conduct original research in natural language processing. Publish findings, build proof-of-concept models, and collaborate with product engineering on productisation.

jobs.title: Management Consultant
jobs.description: Lead client engagements advising Fortune 500 companies on growth strategy, cost reduction, and digital transformation. Own deliverables and client relationships.

jobs.title: Strategy Analyst
jobs.description: Support senior consultants in building market analyses, competitive landscapes, and executive-ready presentations for global clients.

jobs.title: Senior Project Manager
jobs.description: Lead complex, cross-functional technology projects from initiation to closure. Own the project plan, risk register, and executive stakeholder communications.

jobs.title: Agile Scrum Master
jobs.description: Coach engineering teams on Agile principles. Facilitate sprint ceremonies, remove blockers, and drive continuous improvement through retrospective action items.

jobs.title: Business Development Manager
jobs.description: Identify and close strategic partnership and channel deals. Own the partnership pipeline, negotiate commercial terms, and deliver on revenue targets.

jobs.title: Partnership Manager
jobs.description: Nurture and expand existing partner relationships. Run quarterly business reviews, enable partner teams, and identify co-marketing opportunities.

jobs.title: Community Manager
jobs.description: Build and nurture an online and offline community of engaged members. Plan events, moderate discussions, and create content that drives belonging and purpose.

jobs.title: Social Impact Coordinator
jobs.description: Coordinate corporate social responsibility programs, volunteer initiatives, and grant-making activities that advance our social mission.
